# criblio_custom_banner (Resource)

CustomBanner Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_custom_banner" "my_custombanner" {
  enabled = true
  message = "Scheduled maintenance window: Saturday 2am-4am UTC"
  theme   = "purple"
  type    = "custom"

  link         = "https://status.example.com"
  link_display = "View status page"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Show a banner on top of all pages
- `message` (String) Enter a message to display to all your Organization's users, across all Cribl products. Limited to one line and 100 characters; will be truncated as needed.
- `theme` (String)
- `type` (String) must be one of ["custom", "system"]

### Optional

- `created` (Number) Time created
- `custom_themes` (List of String)
- `invert_font_color` (Boolean)
- `link` (String) Optionally, provide a URL to append to the message
- `link_display` (String) Optionally, display your link with a short text label instead of the raw URL (100-character limit)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `created` (Number) Time created
- `custom_themes` (List of String)
- `enabled` (Boolean) Show a banner on top of all pages
- `id` (String)
- `invert_font_color` (Boolean)
- `link` (String) Optionally, provide a URL to append to the message
- `link_display` (String) Optionally, display your link with a short text label instead of the raw URL (100-character limit)
- `message` (String) Enter a message to display to all your Organization's users, across all Cribl products. Limited to one line and 100 characters; will be truncated as needed.
- `theme` (String)
- `type` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = criblio_custom_banner.my_custombanner
  id = "custom-banner"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import criblio_custom_banner.my_custombanner custom-banner
```
